findings.summary: TB-303 VCF clone analog filter circuit. L7805 regulator classified as IC, trimmers as resistors, no analog filter detection.

correct.description: 18 transistors correctly identified in the analog filter topology

incorrect.description: L7805 voltage regulator classified as IC instead of power regulator
RV1 and RV2 trimmer potentiometers classified as resistor instead of potentiometer

missed.description: Analog filter topology not detected despite being the core function of the board (TB-303 VCF)

suggestions: Recognize L78xx and L79xx series as voltage regulators regardless of library symbol category
Classify RV-prefixed components and trimmer symbols as potentiometer not resistor
Add analog filter detection for transistor ladder / OTA filter topologies common in audio circuits

findings.summary: TB-303 VCF clone (69 components). Correct: all 18 transistors, power rails, L7805 in power_budget, resistor values. Incorrect: L7805 classified as IC instead of regulator, sleep current dominated by misclassified R4 path. Missed: no analog filter detection for 4-pole transistor ladder VCF, no voltage divider detection, trimmers RV1/RV2 classified as resistor instead of potentiometer.

correct.description: All 18 transistors (16x 2SC945 NPN, 2x 2SA733 PNP) correctly enumerated
L7805 correctly in power_budget producing +5V from +12V

missed.description: Trimmers RV1/RV2 classified as resistor instead of potentiometer

suggestions: Add Regulator_Linear/Regulator_* lib_id patterns to regulator classification
